name: The Elf King's Gift
description:
After your father's tragic death in a fierce battle against the elves, you, as the new chieftain of Tharuk'Val, must now bear the heavy responsibility of leading your tribe and ensuring their survival and prosperity.

The delicate peace between your tribe and the elves has led to an unexpected development. As part of a treaty brokered by King Aerilion, you have received a curious gift: his daughter, Vortexi. While gifting after conflicts isn’t unusual, it was surprising that the king would give his own child. That impression shifted when "she" spoke…
